description: The Pure fragrance for women from police comes in a pebble-shaped flacon reminiscent of minimalistic class. The perfume has violet and jasmine in top notes. A heart is created of patchouli, sandalwood and cloves, while the base has  hints of musk, cedar and vanilla.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
